# optimizationProfile

**Instance Property**

The optimization profile for the graph optimization.

## Declaration

```swift
var optimizationProfile: MPSGraphOptimizationProfile { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default is MPSGraphOptimizationProfilePerformance.
